item.title: Jolly Good Ginger is with Robby Roadsteamer touring the Freedom 250 State Fair or trying to: "Hey! I hear you do revolutions"
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: 22 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 304
item.description:
These firefighters spent the day fighting wildfires in Spain when they found a deer stranded in the forest
Read that one again
You can't think your way into a new way of acting, you have to act your way into a new way of thinking.
If you’re ever in a rut, drinking a glass of water is an easy step towards getting out of it. Cleaning your teeth and brushing your hair complete the small reset and enable you to take on the next small goal with a little momentum.
~Lanky-Stuff2785
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Ukrainians have launched a new online “game”: changing fuel station statuses on maps, marking empty stations as supplied and supplied stations as empty.
item.description: The result is chaos in Moscow: drivers waste time, burn extra fuel, create traffic jams, and clash at gas stations.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 891
item.description:
1

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Adrian Bouchet
What we call luck is often not purely random, but rather the delayed byproduct of consistently putting yourself in good positions." - James Clear So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Crowd Size Again
item.description: When he tells us what enrages him, use that info against him. Post pics of the wide open spaces on the Mall during tRump’s “Freeedom 250” fiasco. Lots of them. Everywhere.

item.title: Moscow Mitch
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Amanda Moore tours the Trumpified National Mall as the nation attempts to celebrate its 250th birthday. She found a dearth of visitors, a shortage of napkins, and a decaying model of the triumphal arch the president wants to build across the Potomac.
item.description: "Loitering is not permitted in this area," an audio recording sternly warns, as uniformed National Guard troops patrol Washington's iconic, algae-plagued reflecting pool. "Please proceed to a designated location." – Journalist Amanda Moore video report for Mother Jones
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Scaffolding, where's my Scaffolding
item.description: She makes me feel so seen I'm so dysregulated for way too many reasons right now
item.dc:creator: IntegratedTrauma

item.title: Where’d they all go?
item.description: That orange piece of shit turned USA’s 250th into a circus. Temu could put out better displays with far fewer spelling errors.
item.dc:creator: TinFoilWookie

item.title: GovBrief Today #518
item.description: Kash Patel just ordered every FBI field office in America to send analysts to recount an election Donald Trump lost six years ago. The directive pulls 260 analysts and gives them two weeks to comb through Fulton County's 2020 records. Georgia counted those votes three times, once by hand, and got the same answer every time. The only reason to assign that many intelligence analysts to a settled count is to deliver proof of an answer someone has already written. The target can't be 2020. Even if the election deniers were right about every claim, there is nothing left to overturn. A federal finding of "irregularities" in Georgia's biggest Democratic county is a permission slip for whatever comes next. That is not a far-fetched scenario. A federal judge today had to order the Post Office to deliver mail ballots in this year's elections. They are building the case against an election six years ago to take control of the next one. I've emailed 8,073 stories over 518 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260702-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july2 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/death-rate-low [3] https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-blanche [4] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-georgia-election [5] https://go.govbrief.today/park-signs [6] https://go.govbrief.today/june-jobs [7] https://go.govbrief.today/depodesta-leaving [8] https://go.govbrief.today/golf-judge [9] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-herridge [10] https://go.govbrief.today/olympian-indicted [11] https://go.govbrief.today/murrill-indicted [12] https://go.govbrief.today/admin-thermostat [13] https://go.govbrief.today/freedom-250-report [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-crypto [15] https://go.govbrief.today/wa-long-care [16] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-usps Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Touched floating paint peel = Decade in Prison
item.dc:creator: ChocolatePoopy

item.title: I found some memes
item.description:
It's hot outside. This week has been highs in the 90s and it is only JUST July so that's super fun. I am so glad I have a pool.
Curiosity, empathy, and an open mind can do a lot.
I seem to have lost some pixels...
Basically all of my bird memes are stolen from @CodyBurkett
If I'm talking to you why do I need to also look at you in the eyeballs. Why we gotta make it weird. I did have to teach my students to look people in the face when they say hello though, because they wouldn't even greet me back in the morning so the rule was brief eye contact and verbal "good morning" before they could come in the classroom.
(It's usually water but I pretend it's not)
I think I screenshotted this one in the wild cuz it made me laugh but idek
You are a houseplant with more complicated emotions that are usually fixed with food, water, sunlight, and positive human interaction.
This one makes me laugh way harder than it should.
This one too. It's so stupid.
This. Is. All. I. Want.
If my bedroom thermostat goes above 68° at any point I go to instant rage because I can't breathe or sleep.
A friend of mine works for the county parks and rec office and a gentleman called to complain about there being ticks in the park, and he asked that they do something about it.
My psychiatrist now clarifies when she asks if I've had any pain: "apart from the usual?"
I say as I step into the street without checking for traffic
An oldie but a goody
Had to look this up: scarlet tanagers (and other North American "tanagers") have been reclassified into a different genus and are unrelated to "real" tanagers in central and South America.
Winnie tax
item.dc:creator: rjmmbc

item.title: Days 8&9 of being homeless
item.description:
The water from me washing off in the sink turned black. Gross.
Wednesday was miserable, I ended up staying on a friend's couch in the next town over to escape the heat.
Today was the same, but sans the friends couch.
But my case manager managed to get me a spot in interim housing, so I won't be on the street for at least the next 30 days. Here is hoping I can figure out something more long term.
item.dc:creator: Lutki
